statements.sql: INSERT INTO [silver].[FactSales] (customer_sk, product_sk, amount, load_date) SELECT s.CustomerKey, s.ProductKey, s.Amount, GETDATE() FROM [bronze].[Sales] s WHERE s.Amount > 0

refactor.extracted_sql: INSERT INTO [silver].[FactSales] SELECT sale_id, customer_sk, product_sk, amount, load_date FROM [bronze].[Sales]
refactor.refactored_sql:
with source_sales as (
    select * from [bronze].[Sales]
),

final as (
    select
        sale_id,
        customer_sk,
        product_sk,
        amount,
        load_date
    from source_sales
)

select * from final
